---
title: "Genebank performance 2025-26"
author: "Molly Wilson"
date: "2026-07-07"
output: 
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
    theme: cerulean
    highlight: haddock
---

```{r, message = F, warning = F, echo = F}
library(tidyverse)
library(here) 
library(readxl) 
library(janitor)
library(DT)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# import genotype tracking - genebank data
gb_mon <- read_excel(here("restoration_monitoring", "data_raw", "GB monitoring.xlsx"), sheet = "genebank monitoring") %>% 
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(date = ymd(as.character(date))) %>%
  filter(str_detect(genotype, "^(APAL|ACER|APRO)")) %>% # only looking at acroporids here
  select(-n_dead) # other deaths are not represented in this metric if removed between mon. events

gb_perf <- gb_mon %>%
  arrange(nursery, genotype, date) %>%
  group_by(nursery, genotype) %>%
  mutate(
    observed_population =
      coalesce(n_healthy, 0) +
      coalesce(n_bleached, 0) +
      coalesce(n_pale, 0) +
      coalesce(n_diseased_pruned, 0) +
      coalesce(n_other, 0),

    initial_population = first(observed_population),
    cumulative_added = cumsum(coalesce(n_added, 0))
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  # Complete to every monitoring date within each nursery
  group_by(nursery) %>%
  complete(genotype, date = unique(date)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%

  # Add 0s for dates after inception for each genotype
  mutate(
    n_added = coalesce(n_added, 0),
    n_bleached = coalesce(n_bleached, 0),
    n_diseased_pruned = coalesce(n_diseased_pruned, 0),
    n_diseased_removed = coalesce(n_diseased_removed, 0)
  ) %>%

  # Remove dates before genotype existed
  group_by(nursery, genotype) %>%
  mutate(
    first_date = min(date[!is.na(observed_population)])
  ) %>%
  filter(date >= first_date) %>%
  
  fill(initial_population, cumulative_added, .direction = "down") %>%
  
  mutate(
    observed_population = coalesce(observed_population, 0),

    population_persistence =
      observed_population /
      (initial_population + cumulative_added),

    bleaching_prevalence =
      if_else(
        observed_population > 0,
        n_bleached / observed_population,
        NA_real_
      ),
    
    paling_prevalence =
      if_else(
        observed_population > 0,
        n_pale / observed_population,
        NA_real_
      ),

    diseased_total =
      n_diseased_pruned + n_diseased_removed,

    disease_denominator =
      observed_population + n_diseased_removed,

    disease_incidence =
      if_else(
        disease_denominator > 0,
        diseased_total / disease_denominator,
        NA_real_
      )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-first_date)

gb_summary <- gb_perf %>%
  group_by(nursery, genotype) %>%
  summarise(
    final_population_persistence =
      population_persistence[which.max(date)],

    mean_bleaching_prevalence =
      mean(bleaching_prevalence, na.rm = TRUE),

    max_bleaching_prevalence =
      max(bleaching_prevalence, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    mean_paling_prevalence =
      mean(paling_prevalence, na.rm = TRUE),

    max_paling_prevalence =
      max(paling_prevalence, na.rm = TRUE),

    mean_disease_incidence =
      mean(disease_incidence, na.rm = TRUE),

    max_disease_incidence =
      max(disease_incidence, na.rm = TRUE),

    n_surveys = n(),

    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(.x, 2)))

datatable(gb_summary %>% select(nursery, genotype, pop_persistence = final_population_persistence, mean_paling_prevalence, max_paling_prevalence, mean_disease_incidence, max_disease_incidence), 
          options = list(pageLength = 64),
          rownames = FALSE)
```
